parameters.query: INSERT INTO system_logs (workflow_name, execution_id, level, message, details) VALUES ('{{ $json.workflow_name }}', '{{ $json.execution_id }}', 'ERROR', '{{ $json.error_message.replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}') RETURNING id;
